description: Generic feedstock buckets for biogas. Users can map crops to these when exact crop is not in the database.

dry_straw.name: Dry / Straw
dry_straw.description: Straw, hay, crop residues (wheat, barley, rice straw)

green_leafy.name: Green / Leafy
green_leafy.description: Grass, silage, leafy vegetables, green cuttings

root_starch.name: Root / Starch
root_starch.description: Potatoes, sugar beet, cassava, root vegetables

sugary_fruit.name: Sugary / Fruit
sugary_fruit.description: Fruit waste, fruit pulp, high-sugar feedstocks

recipe.recommendation: Balance high-sugar feedstocks with manure or straw to keep C:N in 20–30 range and avoid pH crash.
